Document:
# Proto-Vox
The main reason for Cyberneticization in Vox is, unsurprisingly, to get rid of their oxygen poisoning first and foremost.
## Resistances - Receive [color=#ffa500]20% more heat damage[/color], [color=#8147ff]25% more shock damage[/color], and [color=#FF3636]10% more blunt damage[/color]. - Receive [color=#1e90ff]30% less cold damage[/color] and [color=#64ffe6]10% less poison damage[/color].
With the advent of advanced cybernetics and with some help from their extensive body modifications, Proto-Vox have been able to get rid of their fatal oxygen weakness, and while they still breathe nitrogen, oxygen is no longer toxic to them.
Furthermore, due to these lung modifications, nitrogen-based gaseous sedatives no longer make you tired, and you won't breathe out ammonia anymore. Things that make other nitrogen breathers sleepy will also make you sleepy too.
